restore.notes: Use as reference when rebuilding the PC.

entries.description: wsl-ubuntu-export: exports reference information into the payload for rebuilding the PC.
entries.uiWarning: Large optional data; enable only after checking destination capacity.

entries.instructions: Find the WSL distro VHDX path, check its size, and enable export only when the destination has enough free space.
